title: Mera Balam Thanedaar
subTitle: Determined to ruin Bulbul's life, Drishti starts a fire before asking for her help. Meanwhile, Varnika accuses Bulbul of breaking her fast after finding an empty pack of biscuits in the kitchen.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Parineet tries to escape from Rakesh's men, and Rajeev comes to her aid just in time. He gets a serious injury after the fight.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Preeto believes Harman and Surbhi are hiding a secret and decides to search their room. Varun sounds the alarm after seeing a mysterious man sneaking out of the house.

title: Mata Saraswati
subTitle: Navigating 14 worlds, Goddess Saraswati, the celestial embodiment of wisdom and art, seeks the arcane knowledge needed to restore Lord Narayan's severed head.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Ellie, the baby elephant, has escaped from the circus train, and Mayor Goodway's chicken has gone missing, leading to a search of Adventure Bay.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Captain Turbot has decorated an old wreck as a pirate ship for a Halloween party. When the ship mysteriously heads out to sea, Ryder and the PAW Patrol must save it.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Someone has been swiping fish off Cap'n Turbot's boat. Adventure Bay's newest dolphin pup accidentally swims into a shallow-water stream.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: While on a safari, the pups must reunite and rescue an elephant family. The Kitten Catastrophe Crew arrives in Adventure Bay and makes a mess.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Just as the PAW Patrol is about to help Farmer Al capture his runaway pigs, Chase, Zuma and Skye all become ill. Also, when lunches start disappearing at an old miner's cabin in the woods, the PAW Patrol comes to investigate.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Rocky helps repair the tyres on the Adventure Bay school bus. Ryder and Chase search for missing songbirds.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The PAW Patrol must work together when Mayor Humdinger challenges the Adventure Bay team to a soccer match. Marshall believes his new collar is lucky, so he takes risky chances while helping to rescue Hootie.

title: Motu Patlu
subTitle: Best friends Motu and Patlu live in Furfuri Nagar. When they land in the most hilarious situations, Motu is the one who generally creates problems, while Patlu tries to solve them.

title: Khatra Khatra Khatra
subTitle: Harsh sets up a new business to help couples get divorced. Shortly after, future Mrs Narayan makes an appearance and roasts Aditya.

title: Salaam-E-Ishq
subTitle: Aaliya and Zain are forced to get married to each other. However, they don't have any feelings for each other, except hatred.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
subTitle: After Simar and Roli marry into the Bharadwaj family and prove to be the perfect daughters-in-law, Simar Bhardwaj is entrusted with finding an ideal wife for Gitanjali Devi's grandson.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Harman tells Preeto to stop prying into his private life. Maninder checks on Surbhi, but Surbhi does not appreciate his concern.

title: Sindoor Ek Vachan
subTitle: Shantanu, a man of conviction who lives life according to his own principles, crosses paths with Poorna, who alters both his way of life and his worldview.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki

title: Suman Indori
subTitle: Forced by fate to marry a rich, shrewd politician, Suman embraces obstacles adjusting to her new life while dealing with her sister-in-law who seeks to become the head of the household.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: In a state of panic, Parineet calls Rajeev and informs him about Shera's presence and later asks Rajeev to save her from Shera.

title: Bindiya Chamkegi
subTitle: Shalini wants his brother Shyam to get married prior to her, but since he was betrayed by Maya, he starts hating women. He hires Bindiya to act as his wife so that he can get her sister married first.

title: Mera Balam Thanedaar
subTitle: Sulakshana lashes out at Varnika after Baiji's confession exposes her false accusations, and Drishti plans to set the house on fire to engineer a misunderstanding between Veer and Bulbul.

title: Jai Jagannath
subTitle: Following the cessation of the Kurukshetra War, Lord Krishna arrives in Dwarka to find turmoil and disarray. He then strives to re-establish harmony and faith.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Marshall gets a new best friend when a gosling takes a liking to him, and then Ryder and the PAW Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save the major.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to rescue Alex when he takes off on his new trike, and Marshall proves he is a true hero when he puts out a fire on the beach.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The PAW Patrol is on an excavation dig when they unearth three fossilised eggs. Suddenly the eggs start to hatch and there are three baby pterodactyls running around.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: While delivering special pizza dough for a party, Alex and Mr Porter get into an accident. A storm causes Skye to crash-land in the snow while on her way to Jake's Mountain.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Ryder investigates when jets of water start springing up all over town. The PAW Patrol helps a rancher find a spooked horse.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups must come to the rescue when a family of monkeys scatters into the jungle after being scared off by lava erupting from a volcano.
